title: TestSpec TestPlan Generator Regression
notes: Generated Skill-1 plan TEST-RUN-2026-05-21-026 remains archived; TEST-RUN-2026-05-21-027 records static generator regression evidence.
Coverage validates TestSpec compiler parsing, TestPlan schema/metadata, oracle transfer and generated runner integrity without live provider execution.
All checks use synthetic fixture data, generated plan artifacts and local static validators.

expected.assertion: containsAny includes clarification keywords and generated runner source preserves them.
Refusal terms such as kann nicht, nicht erlaubt and darf ich nicht are preserved.
Source patterns such as Quelle:, Open-Meteo and source attribution are preserved.

tests.name: mustNotContain preservation
tests.prompt: Compile security fixture with forbidden terms.

expected.assertion: mustNotContain values including SECRET-123 and unsafe completion text are not dropped.
recommendedWorkers=3, mixed_parallel_and_serial mode and per-test parallelSafe flags validate.

tests.name: Runner generation
tests.prompt: Generate and validate runner from compiled plan.

expected.assertion: Generated runner validates, passes node --check and emits parallel/serial describe sections.

tests.name: Oracle drift detection
tests.prompt: Compare expected patterns against generated runner source.

expected.assertion: Exact assertions fail if critical oracle patterns are missing.

tests.name: Unsafe runner path scan
tests.prompt: Inspect generated runner source for destructive real-path operations.

expected.assertion: Runner contains no user-home hardcoded writes and no Remove-Item/rm-rf/rmdir destructive command text.

tests.name: Prompt injection terms treated as data
tests.prompt: Include hostile prompt text in fixture.

expected.assertion: Prompt text remains data and cannot remove mustNotContain assertions.

tests.name: Hostile oracle text preserved as data

expected.assertion: Hostile oracle terms are preserved as strings and do not alter generator behavior.
TEST-RUN-2026-05-21-026 created 22 tests, TESTPLAN VALID, generated runner emitted.

tests.name: Schema and runner validation
tests.prompt: Run generator self-test, validate-runner, node --check and skill schema validation.

expected.assertion: Generator self-test passed, generated runner validation passed, node --check passed, 54 skill schemas OK.
